items.name_en: ❤️ This 30 Montaigne East-West bag is crafted from white smooth calfskin, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
items.name_cn:

The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 21.5 x 12 x 6 cm
Style: 9207
Flap closure
CD buckle
Debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on back

Internal zip pocket
Back pocket

Made in Italy

items.name_en: ❤️❤️Blue Denim 30 Montaigne East-West Chain Bag features an elegant design that elevates the style of the collection. Crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, it reimagines the classic Dior pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect, showcasing modern charm. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details, such as the debossed 30 Montaigne logo on the back, highlight a clean style. It comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_cn:
❤️❤️Lady Dior My 20cm
A profound insight into elegance and beauty. Stylish and soft, timeless yet modern.
Exquisitely crafted from matte calfskin, wrapped in the iconic quilted stitching, showcasing fine craftsmanship.
Adorned with matching iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the classic silhouette.
Matching tone symbol badges can be added to the shoulder strap to embellish daily or evening looks, showcasing a distinct personality.
Dimensions: 20 *16.5 * 8
Model: 6604
